negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_a5548ead-579e-41a2-aa32-be89dbe2f3dd
prompt: A medium shot captures two men in military uniforms engaged in a gear adjustment activity outdoors during the day. The man on the left, wearing a grayish-green helmet and dark sunglasses, is facing the camera. He is dressed in a gray military uniform with brown vertical and horizontal straps, a gray shirt, green pouches under each arm, and a country flag patch on his right arm. His left arm is raised at a 90-degree angle, while his right arm hangs lower. The man on the right, with short dark hair and a clean-shaven face, is dressed similarly with an insignia on his left arm indicating his military rank. He has a black watch on his left wrist and a green pouch under his left arm. His hands are positioned near the other man's green pouch, assisting with adjustments.  As the action progresses, the man on the right fiddles with the pouch, while the other man repositions his left arm to facilitate access. Subsequently, the man on the right moves his left hand to the side of the pouch facing the camera, lowering his head briefly. A silver ring is visible on his left ring finger. He then raises his head and pulls part of the pouch upward while looking at it. The background features a clear blue sky with some clouds on the right, and a large gray aircraft with visible propellers is seen in the distance. The horizon is lined with a dense forest area, and in front of it, there is a green grassy area behind a paved area where the soldiers are standing. Other soldiers in similar uniforms can be seen in the background, adding to the bustling military environment. The scene is illuminated by bright sunlight, creating a vivid and dynamic atmosphere.
